description: Travel follows a 'shoeka' from a starting place towards one or more destinations. The route may join several paths, roads, crossings, or transit stages. 'ruela' (path) is the traversable ground, and 'laniru' (journey) is the extended event of traveling along the course.
articulatory_notes: Shape unvoiced 'sh' just behind the alveolar ridge and round into mid-back 'o'. Hold the following stressed mid-front 'e' as its own syllable after the hiatus, then close the back of the tongue for 'k' and release into open 'a'.

semantic_domains.spatial: a selected course linking the places or stages of travel
